cueCards.topic: Describe a skill you have learned
cueCards.bullet2: How and when you learned it
cueCards.bullet3: How difficult it was to learn
cueCards.question: and explain how this skill has been useful in your life.
followUp: Do you think it's important for people to keep learning new skills throughout their lives?
What kinds of skills are most valued in your country right now?
How has technology changed the way people learn new skills?

cueCards.topic: Describe a memorable journey you have taken
cueCards.question: and explain why this journey was memorable.
followUp: Do you think travelling abroad is important for young people?
How do you think tourism affects local communities?
What are the pros and cons of travelling alone versus with others?
